value:
I understand your frustration—it sounds like you're experiencing a delay with your Buenos Aires to London flight, and the boarding process seems to be running behind schedule.

To help you right away, could you share your booking reference? That will let me check the current status of your flight and get you accurate information about the boarding timeline and any updates from the crew.

In the meantime, please stay in contact with the gate agents on site, as they'll have the most up-to-date details on when boarding will complete and when departure is expected. If there are any significant delays, the crew will communicate that to passengers.

I'm here to help sort this out once I have your booking details.
